summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InvoicePush invoice management app. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI working with excellent dark theme and currency formatting. All major CRUD operations tested successfully.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for accessibility

passed_tests: Customer CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Items CRUD operations with ₹ currency formatting
Invoice CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Dark sidebar navigation with all links
Indian Rupees (₹) currency formatting throughout app

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor accessibility warnings)
